entry.title: New IDC W31P4Q17D0026 awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W0H9 US ARMY AVN & MISSLES CMD

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: CONTRACT W31P4Q-17-D-0026 AWARDED TO LOCKHEED MARTIN MISSILES AND FIRE CONTROL (LMMFC) COMPANY, FOR THE CALENDAR YEAR (CY)17 - CY21 PHASED ARRAY TRACKING RADAR INTERCEPT ON TARGET (PATRIOT) ADVANCED CAPABILITY-3 MISSILE SUPPORT CENTER (P3MSC) PAC-3 POST-PRODUCTION EFFORT FOR THE UNITED STATES (US) AND FOREIGN MILITARY SALES (FMS)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER GUIDED MISSILE AND SPACE VEHICLE PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorAlternateName: LOCKHEED MARTIN MISSILES AND FIRE CONTROL

entry.title: IDC W31P4Q17D0026 (P00001) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W0H9 US ARMY AVN & MISSLES CMD

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PURPOSE OF MOD P00001 IS TO ADD SLINS 0007AA AND 0010AA FOR LOGISTICS SUPPORT MISSILE REPAIR AND LOGISTICS SUPPORT MISSILE RECERTIFICATION, RESPECTIVELY, TO CONTRACT W31P4Q-17-D-0026. THIS IS A NO-COST MODIFICATION

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER GUIDED MISSILE AND SPACE VEHICLE PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W31P4Q17D0026 (P00009) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS CONTRACT IS IN SUPPORT OF THE PATRIOT ADVANCED CAPABILITY-3 (PAC-3) MISSILE SUPPORT CENTER (P3MSC) FOR THE UNITED STATES (US) AND FOREIGN MILITARY SALES (FMS). THIS MODIFICATION ESTABLISHES CLINS 0003AE AND 0003AF TO ADD FUNDING TO THE SRTS FOR TAIWAN AND UAE.
